user_system_path: SCOUT §3 (#494), promoted from compass #492, supersedes the build umbrella #486. The build is done and inward (Stages 0-5 #487/#488/#490/#491 + inward retarget #493 all merged; the deployed Scout watches the user's own world and never hunts the open web or fabricates credentials). The remaining money-move is owner-gated runtime activation: turn the hands on for ONE real inward loop on REAL data. This PR is a control-plane reconciliation only (repoint source truth 486 -> 494); it is NOT a Scout phase and claims no product proof.
allowed_files_raw: SCOUT seam #486: scout engine (lib/scout/**), shared Drive extractor + crawl (lib/sync/**), researcher web-access swap, generator writer reuse, scout cron routes, embeddings schema (supabase/migrations/**), feature flags (lib/config/prelaunch-spend.ts), deps (package.json), and Scout docs. Control-plane + Bible governance edits permitted.
forbidden_files_raw: No dashboard or visual redesign, no components/** changes, no Stripe, no secrets/.env. Scout proposes review-gated artifacts only — never auto-send.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npm run build
required_browser_proof: Real product proof every phase or NO PASS (AGENTS.md Proof Doctrine, Scout lane): a live Scout card the owner can see — a Slack permalink or screenshot — built by the actual delivery builder. Hygiene (mocked tests, typecheck, lint, gate:continuity, build, green preview deploy) is necessary but never a pass on its own. Absent real proof, the phase is BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT.
browser_proof_command: Free real proof: render buildScoutSlackMessage() for a fixture proposal and post it to the owner Slack (#foldera-self-loop) — a real card, no paid loop. The app's own live adapter path (POST-trigger GET /api/cron/scout/deliver with SLACK_BOT_TOKEN set) is owner-gated.
acceptance_condition: Each Scout phase: code lands additive + flag-gated (zero behavior change with SCOUT_* flags off); gate:continuity + typecheck + lint(0) + build green; AND a real Scout card is shown (live Slack permalink/screenshot) or an exact owner-gated BLOCKED receipt is posted. Hygiene-only is NO PASS.
anti_regression_checks: Workday Presence pipeline unchanged with all SCOUT_* flags off
no auto-send / no new outbound path introduced
no forbidden public-facing claim terms in app/components/public
stop_condition: Control-plane reconciliation lands as a draft PR repointing source truth from #486 to the active seam #494; gate:continuity green at #494. The real money-move (#494: one real inward loop on REAL data) stays BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT — owner-gated runtime activation the sandbox cannot perform (Voyage key, SCOUT_*/ALLOW_PAID_LLM flags, CRON_SECRET cron triggers, ENCRYPTION_KEY_LEGACY decrypt).
next_command: Owner: activate #494. (1) Set VOYAGE_API_KEY + flip SCOUT_ENABLED/SCOUT_RAG_ENABLED/SCOUT_WEB_ENABLED/ALLOW_PAID_LLM/SCOUT_DELIVERY_ENABLED in Vercel prod, redeploy. (2) Confirm ENCRYPTION_KEY_LEGACY covers all historical keys (#481). (3) GET /api/cron/scout/index-drive (CRON_SECRET) for the paid first index. (4) GET /api/cron/scout/deliver (CRON_SECRET) for one real inward Slack card. (5) Judge by gut >=3x/week, labeled owner-only.
